paragraphs.text: Diligently Compared with the Hebrew, Greek, and Other Editions in Divers Languages
The Old Testament was first published by the English College at Douay, 1609:
The New Testament, by the English College at Rheims, A.D. 1582
The Whole Revised and Corrected According to the Clementine Edition of The Scriptures By
Annotations, by the rev. Dr. Challoner; together with references, and an historical and chronological index.
